title: Elections tuning config
description: Operator-tunable knobs for the elections ingest pipeline: provenance grade priorities, field-level adapter precedence, discrepancy thresholds. Enums (sex, party_type, education, profession) deliberately live in artifact schemas (people.entity.schema.json), NOT here — taxonomy is contract, not tuning. Mixing the two invites someone to 'tune' an enum value and break consumers.

sources.description: Hand-authored config per CLAUDE.md §12 — empty array.

provenance_grades.description: Universal 4-tier grades with numeric priority. Higher priority wins in field merge. Source-agnostic by design.

field_priority.description: Per-field ordered list of adapter ids. First adapter in the list wins when multiple adapters contribute the same field. Adapter ids are publishers/transports (eci_html, eci_statreport), never carriers.

discrepancy_thresholds.description: Per-(state, election_year) thresholds. Halt aborts the ingest run; warn writes the artifact and flags the report. Never aggregated across years — hides regime-specific methodology breaks (Hans).
